ItacPersonItem.Notes: Vanti is wronglypublished by called `rhodiginus` in the list of members of the Accademia Veneziana seconda Maria Domenico Pellegrini. On his Bolognese origins and his life, see Giovanni Fantuzzi, Notizie degli scrittori bolognesi. vol. 7 (1789).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
